Stainless Steel Double-Sided Straight Ruler, 30cm, Centimetre and Inch Scale

£9.99

This stainless steel double-sided ruler is a precision measuring tool that is essential for any workshop or office. Crafted from durable stainless steel, it features clear markings in both centimetres and inches, allowing for accurate measurements up to 30 centimetres. The straight edge design ensures precise alignments, making it ideal for drafting, carpentry, sewing, and various DIY projects.

← Back to Shop

This stainless steel double-sided ruler is a precision measuring tool that is essential for any workshop or office. Crafted from durable stainless steel, it features clear markings in both centimetres and inches, allowing for accurate measurements up to 30 centimetres. The straight edge design ensures precise alignments, making it ideal for drafting, carpentry, sewing, and various DIY projects. Its compact size and lightweight construction make it easy to carry and store, while its rust-resistant material ensures long-lasting use. Whether you are a professional tradesperson or a hobbyist, this versatile ruler is an indispensable addition to your toolkit.

DhivanSTech

  • DhivanSTech

    DhivanSTech (DST) is an electronics brand supplying tested DIY maker components and test equipment via Amazon. We also document real builds, experiments, and engineering projects.
